name: continuous-improvement-dev
description: Development marketplace for the Continuous Improvement Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: continuous-improvement
plugins.description: The persistent-memory and runtime-discipline layer for Claude Code. It remembers the corrections you already gave, grounds every edit in real facts before it lands, and — through the Mulahazah engine — turns each fix into a reusable instinct, so a lesson learned once is applied automatically next time with no re-teaching. Built on the 7 Laws of AI Agent Discipline (research, plan, verify, reflect, learn) and shipped as 27 bundled skills, instinct-aware hooks, an MCP toolset for recall and reflection, and a GitHub Action transcript linter that feeds real work history back into sharper instincts.
